name: Skull of Endless Torment
description: Notes This is a very powerful swapout skull. In fact, it is one of the few ways to obtain purification through abilities, and because of that, it sees large use when dealing with a large group of players (for example, in Oryx’s Sanctuary).
effects: On Ability use with full meter: Purify status effects within 4 squares Necromancy: raise 1 Endless Torment Undead to fight for you.
Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles
